## Result / 结果

## Changes / 改动

## Verification / 验证

## Risks / 风险

<!-- Note data-safety, compatibility, performance, and unverified boundaries. -->

- [ ] The change is focused and adds no unnecessary dependency or generated artifact.
- [ ] New behavior has repeatable tests or self-check coverage.
- [ ] `bash Scripts/check.sh` passes, or the remaining blocker is explained above.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, and samples contain no private data or local paths.
